# CWE-331 vulnerable — Insufficient Entropy
lang: go
file: CWE-331-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"math/rand"
	"net/http"
	"strconv"
	"time"
)

type GinCtx struct {
	Request *http.Request
}

type GormDB struct{}

func (db *GormDB) Create(value interface{}) error { return nil }

func IssueRecoveryCode(c *GinCtx, db *GormDB) error {
	rng := rand.New(rand.NewSource(time.Now().UnixNano()))
	code := strconv.Itoa(rng.Intn(900000) + 100000)
	return db.Create(map[string]string{"email": c.Request.PostFormValue("email"), "code": code})
}
